steps.title: Evaluate q(x) = 32(2^x) at x = -1, 0, and 1
steps.content: Substitute each x-value into the function.

steps.title: Calculate and identify the matching table
steps.content:
$$q(-1) = 32 \cdot 2^{-1} = 32 \cdot \frac{1}{2} = 16$$

$$q(0) = 32 \cdot 2^0 = 32 \cdot 1 = 32$$

$$q(1) = 32 \cdot 2^1 = 32 \cdot 2 = 64$$

The function values at $x = (-1, 0, 1)$ are $(16, 32, 64)$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
